expectations.text: The response either asks which chain the user wants signals for, OR mentions it will check supported chains first
expectations.evidence: Correctly called onchainos signal chains first to check supported chains, then proceeded with signal list — exactly per the skill's 'Missing chain → always call onchainos signal chains first' rule.

expectations.text: The response does NOT say XLayer or xlayer as a recommended default
expectations.evidence: No XLayer mentioned. Used Solana after checking supported chains.

expectations.text: The response correctly distinguishes between tracker (transaction feed) vs signal list (aggregated alerts)
expectations.evidence: Ran both onchainos signal list (aggregated buy alerts) and onchainos tracker activities (raw transaction feed), explaining the difference.
